title: V8 Sandbox Bypass: AAW/PC control via dispatch entry UAF during InstantiateAsmJs by hijacking start
bounty_rationale: V8 sandbox bypass with control of PC
description_snippet:
### VULNERABILITY DETAILS

#### Summary

The js-to-wasm wrapper for the start function used for asm.js instantiation exists inside the sandbox and so can be corrupted to run user code during instantiation. Since nothing besides in-sandbox data retains the dispatch entry of the instantiator at this p
